data.title: Yiren Digital (NYSE: YRD) wins "Annual Digital Intelligence Innovative Application Award" by Caijing New Media in Beijing.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, Yiren Digital Ltd. (NYSE: YRD) disclosed that it has received an undisclosed amount of investment. Yiren Digital, a prominent Fintech company in digital consumer lending, insurance, and financial technology in China and Southeast Asia, made this announcement.

data.title: ScanmarQED acquires MMM Labs, US startup known for multi-engine MMM, enabling varied modeling methodologies.
data.description: In HOUTEN, Netherlands on January 22, 2026, ScanmarQED revealed their acquisition of MMM Labs, a startup located in the United States recognized for its innovative multi-engine strategy in Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM). This acquisition enables teams to utilize various modeling methodologies simultaneously and avoid restrictions.

data.title: 2026 Oscar nominations to be revealed by Danielle Brooks & Lewis Pullman from Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences.
data.description: Danielle Brooks and Lewis Pullman will be revealing the nominations from the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences headquarters. The announcement will include contenders in various categories for the upcoming prestigious awards ceremony.

data.title: Epidemic Sound updates AI-powered Assistant for quick music/sound selection in content creation, now with prompt examples and more features.
data.description: Epidemic Sound has introduced new features to its creative collaborator, Assistant, to streamline the process of discovering ideal music and sound effects for content. The updated Assistant now includes prompt examples, a track mini player, and Epidemic Sound's innovative 'Find Similar' technology. These enhancements aim to make the search for the perfect audio accompaniments faster and more user-friendly for creators.

data.title: More travelers opt for short vacations, with a 34% increase in bookings for long weekends in 2026, seeking meaningful getaways.
data.description: A significant 34% surge has been observed in the number of travelers seeking short vacations. Long weekends no longer signify staying home to relax but rather an opportunity to embark on meaningful getaways. This trend is especially noted in Singapore, as of January 22, 2026. In the upcoming year, long weekends are anticipated to witness a rise in the preference for seizing the moment to travel and explore, reflecting a shift in travel habits towards more frequent, albeit shorter, vacations.

data.title: Ohio's two nursing programs reveal the impact of US limits on student borrowing, showing the potential consequences.
data.description: In Ohio, there are two nursing school programs showcasing the potential outcomes of restricted federal student borrowing.

data.title: 250th birthday celebrations in America include Girl Scouts singing, flag party, and Times Square ball drop.
data.description: To celebrate the Semiquincentennial, events such as Girl Scouts performing folk songs, a flag-waving party, and a Times Square ball drop are planned. The festivities will mark 250 years since the founding in a vibrant display of patriotism and tradition. Various activities and performances will take place, symbolizing the historical significance of this milestone. The celebrations will draw attention from locals and tourists alike, with an expected turnout of thousands of attendees ready to commemorate this special occasion in their respective communities.

data.title: Rental car accident in Australia. Thrifty kept couple's full deposit for a year, didn't provide needed invoice for insurance claim.
data.description: A rental car company, Thrifty, reportedly held onto a couple's entire deposit for more than a year following an incident in Australia. The company allegedly refused to supply the couple with the necessary invoice required for an insurance claim.
